query_normalized: predicting the impact of composition on the weibull modulus of ceramics materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by measuring mechanical properties (specifically Young's modulus and nanohardness) across a range of specific ceramic compositions, providing empirical data on how composition affects mechanical stiffness in the relevant domain.
